prompt: You are gintary preparing a live Hermes Kanban card for ginb. The body already has Objective, Scope, Acceptance, and a future docs/briefs/DM-42.md link, but that brief is not written yet. The gateway continuously recomputes blocked tasks. Give the exact safe CLI/order from card creation through parking, writing artifacts, assigning ginb, harness validation, and unblocking. Explain why each transition is safe.
assertions: Creates the card without assigning ginb before setup is parked
Uses hermes kanban block --kind needs_input with options before the task ID
Explains that initial blocked status alone lacks the sticky blocked event and may auto-promote
Assigns ginb only after artifacts are written and unblocks only after harness validation
